shopping_406.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent successfully identified the correct cereal and added it to the shopping cart. However, the objective was to "buy" the cereal, which implies completing the purchase process (e.g., proceeding to checkout and confirming the order), not just adding it to the cart. The agent stopped prematurely after adding the item to the cart.
shopping_406.REFLECTION: When the objective is to "buy" an item, ensure the entire purchase process is completed, including navigating to the cart, proceeding to checkout, and confirming the order, rather than stopping after merely adding the item to the cart. Look for "checkout" or "proceed to purchase" buttons after adding an item.
